category_sources: source_facts.description says icestorm provides tools for analyzing and creating Lattice iCE40 FPGA bitstream files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the Project IceStorm documentation site; source_facts.name identifies the package as icestorm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation site for Project IceStorm.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an official repository URL, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies FPGA bitstream analysis/creation; source_facts.executables lists IceStorm tools such as icepack, iceprog, icetime, and iceunpack.
